evidence_quotes.quote: Shutting down servers or removing digital titles without offering offline functionality or preservation options is unfair and harmful to gaming culture.

paragraphs.text: I signed this petition because I believe consumers should have the right to access the games they purchased - indefinitely. Shutting down servers or removing digital titles without offering offline functionality or preservation options is unfair and harmful to gaming culture. Video games are more than just products - they are art, history, and part of peoples lives. The industry needs legal standards to protect digital ownership and prevent companies from erasing what players value.
